option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Save to Collection" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:maxHeight="300dp">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/categoriesContainer" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" />
</ScrollView>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnCreateCategory" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="+ Create New Category" android:textColor="@color/green_primary" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/background_surface">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/white" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Community Feed" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tunisia" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/green_primary" android:textStyle="bold" />
</LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvFeed" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingLeft="12dp" android:paddingRight="12dp" android:paddingTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="100dp" android:clipToPadding="false" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/background_surface">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="@color/white" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:elevation="4dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Community Feed" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Tunisia" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@color/green_primary" android:textStyle="bold" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Filter Bar --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:background="@color/white" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<Spinner android:id="@+id/spinnerSpeciesFilter" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_input" />
<Spinner android:id="@+id/spinnerStatusFilter" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="40dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_input" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnResetFilter" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="40dp" android:text="Reset" android:textSize="11sp" app:iconSize="16dp" app:iconPadding="0dp" />
</LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvFeed" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:paddingLeft="12dp" android:paddingRight="12dp" android:paddingTop="12dp" android:paddingBottom="100dp" android:clipToPadding="false" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/white" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<!-- User Profile Photo Image --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivUserAvatar" android:layout_width="38dp" android:layout_height="38dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:background="@color/green_light" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsername" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Sara A." android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUserLocation" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Nabeul · 2h ago" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
</LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatusBadge" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="LC" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:paddingTop="3dp" android:paddingBottom="3dp" android:background="@color/status_lc_bg" android:textColor="@color/status_lc_text" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Species Main Photo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivSpeciesPhoto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:background="@color/green_light" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSpeciesName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Mediterranean Chameleon" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="2dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCaption" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Found near Cap Bon! First sighting this season" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
</LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSave" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:padding="0dp" app:icon="@android:drawable/btn_star_big_off" app:iconPadding="0dp" app:iconSize="28dp" app:iconTint="@android:color/black" />
</LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/divider" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/white" android:layout_marginBottom="10dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<!-- User Profile Photo Image --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="38dp" android:layout_height="38dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/ivUserAvatar" android:layout_width="38dp" android:layout_height="38dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:background="@color/green_light" />
<!-- User Badge --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivUserBadge" android:layout_width="14dp" android:layout_height="14dp" android:layout_gravity="bottom|end" android:contentDescription="User badge" /> </FrameLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUsername" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Sara A." android:textSize="13sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUserLocation" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Nabeul · 2h ago" android:textSize="11sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" />
</LinearLayout>
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvStatusBadge" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="LC" android:textSize="11sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" android:paddingTop="3dp" android:paddingBottom="3dp" android:background="@color/status_lc_bg" android:textColor="@color/status_lc_text" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Species Main Photo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/ivSpeciesPhoto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:background="@color/green_light" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvSpeciesName" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Mediterranean Chameleon" android:textSize="15sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:layout_marginBottom="2dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvCaption" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Found near Cap Bon! First sighting this season" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@color/divider" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" />
<!-- Action Buttons --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="8dp" android:gravity="center">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnLike" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Like" android:textSize="12sp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_view" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="@android:color/darker_gray" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnComment" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Comment" android:textSize="12sp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_edit" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="@android:color/darker_gray" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnShare" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Share" android:textSize="12sp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_share" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="@android:color/darker_gray" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSave" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Save" android:textSize="12sp" app:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_add" app:iconSize="20dp" app:iconTint="@android:color/darker_gray" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: [ { "id": 1, "userId": "u1", "userInitials": "SA", "userName": "Mohamed A.", "location": "Nabeul", "timeAgo": "2h ago", "speciesId": 1, "speciesName": "Mediterranean Chameleon", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "VU", "caption": "Found near Cap Bon! First sighting this season ", "likes": 18, "isLiked": false, "isSaved": false }, { "id": 2, "userId": "u2", "userInitials": "MK", "userName": "Sarra K.", "location": "Tunis", "timeAgo": "5h ago", "speciesId": 2, "speciesName": "Barbary Falcon", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "LC", "caption": "Circling above Belvédère Park again — magnificent bird ", "likes": 34, "isLiked": true, "isSaved": false }, { "id": 3, "userId": "u3", "userInitials": "LB", "userName": "Leila B.", "location": "Zaghouan", "timeAgo": "1d ago", "speciesId": 6, "speciesName": "Asphodel Plant", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "LC", "caption": "Spring is here! Asphodel blooming near the Roman temple ", "likes": 22, "isLiked": false, "isSaved": true }, { "id": 5, "userId": "u5", "userInitials": "NR", "userName": "Karim R.", "location": "Aïn Draham", "timeAgo": "3d ago", "speciesId": 7, "speciesName": "Atlas Cedar", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "VU", "caption": "Spent the day in the Kroumirie forest. The Atlas Cedars are stunning ", "likes": 45, "isLiked": true, "isSaved": true }, { "id": 6, "userId": "u6", "userInitials": "KT", "userName": "Amira T.", "location": "Tataouine", "timeAgo": "4d ago", "speciesId": 3, "speciesName": "Saharan Horned Viper", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "LC", "caption": "Early morning desert walk — spotted this viper at sunrise. Nature is wild! ", "likes": 61, "isLiked": false, "isSaved": false } ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: [ { "id": 1, "userId": "u1", "userInitials": "SA", "userName": "Mohamed A.", "location": "Nabeul", "timeAgo": "2h ago", "speciesId": 1, "speciesName": "Mediterranean Chameleon", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "VU", "caption": "Found near Cap Bon! First sighting this season ", "likes": 18, "isLiked": false, "isSaved": false, "commentCount": 3, "userBadgeLevel": 2 }, { "id": 2, "userId": "u2", "userInitials": "MK", "userName": "Sarra K.", "location": "Tunis", "timeAgo": "5h ago", "speciesId": 2, "speciesName": "Barbary Falcon", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "LC", "caption": "Circling above Belvédère Park again — magnificent bird ", "likes": 34, "isLiked": true, "isSaved": false, "commentCount": 7, "userBadgeLevel": 3 }, { "id": 3, "userId": "u3", "userInitials": "LB", "userName": "Leila B.", "location": "Zaghouan", "timeAgo": "1d ago", "speciesId": 6, "speciesName": "Asphodel Plant", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "LC", "caption": "Spring is here! Asphodel blooming near the Roman temple ", "likes": 22, "isLiked": false, "isSaved": true, "commentCount": 2, "userBadgeLevel": 1 }, { "id": 5, "userId": "u5", "userInitials": "NR", "userName": "Karim R.", "location": "Aïn Draham", "timeAgo": "3d ago", "speciesId": 7, "speciesName": "Atlas Cedar", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "VU", "caption": "Spent the day in the Kroumirie forest. The Atlas Cedars are stunning ", "likes": 45, "isLiked": true, "isSaved": true, "commentCount": 5, "userBadgeLevel": 3 }, { "id": 6, "userId": "u6", "userInitials": "KT", "userName": "Amira T.", "location": "Tataouine", "timeAgo": "4d ago", "speciesId": 3, "speciesName": "Saharan Horned Viper", "emoji": "", "conservationStatus": "LC", "caption": "Early morning desert walk — spotted this viper at sunrise. Nature is wild! ", "likes": 61, "isLiked": false, "isSaved": false, "commentCount": 9, "userBadgeLevel": 2 } ]
